_comment: Mutation testing for the pure lib/ modules — measures whether the unit/property tests actually kill injected bugs. Runs weekly (non-blocking), like fuzz. See docs/testing.md.
_mutate_comment: Logic-bearing pure modules. Omitted: gestures.ts (its swipeNavigate DOM action is E2E- not unit-tested) and syllabus-icons.ts (a presentation data table — mutating emoji/colour literals reflects data, not a test weakness).
